label: Enacted law or binding COP instrument
definition: The brief identifies enacted dedicated laws, regulations, or binding child online protection instruments.

label: Advanced draft pathway
definition: The brief identifies a draft bill, draft law, or primary legislative pathway in motion.

label: Strategy, guideline, or policy only
definition: The brief identifies a dedicated strategy, guideline, or policy without primary legislative backing.

label: General legal coverage
definition: The brief identifies broader cybercrime, penal, telecom, data protection, or child protection frameworks with partial relevance.

label: No identifiable framework
definition: The brief identifies no specific legislation, regulation, or policy framework on child online safety.
